name: Raspberry Pi OS
tagline: The official OS for Raspberry Pi — education meets maker culture
description: Raspberry Pi OS (formerly Raspbian) is the official operating system for Raspberry Pi single-board computers, maintained by the Raspberry Pi Foundation. Based on Debian, it ships the lightweight PIXEL desktop (built on LXDE/Openbox), Scratch, Python tools, and education software out of the box. It runs flawlessly on ARM hardware from the original Pi to the Pi 5, and the 64-bit edition supports headless server workloads. Its documentation is among the most thorough and welcoming of any Linux project, making it excellent for beginners, students, and anyone exploring physical computing.
